utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , Rach , can I borrow your eyelash curler , I think I lost mine .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , it is in there .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh ! Ohh ! Oh ! !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Joey , can I talk to you for a second ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oohh ! ! Ohh ! Oh ... oh ... oh ! Oh ... oh ! !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: oooooooooooooohhhhhhhhhhh

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes . Yes .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You ? ! And ... and you ? !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Yes , but you cannot tell anyone ! No one knows !

emotion_cause.span: 9_you cannot tell anyone ! No one knows !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: How ? ! When ? !

emotion_cause.span: 9_Yes , but you cannot tell anyone ! No one knows !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: It happened in London .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: IN LONDON ! ! !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: The reason we did not tell anyone was because we did not want to make a big deal out of it .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But it is a big deal ! ! I have to tell someone !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: No ... no ... no ... no ... no ! You can not !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Please ? Please ? ! We just do not want to deal with telling everyone , okay ? Just promise you will not tell .

emotion_cause.span: 16_We just do not want to deal with telling everyone

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: All right ! Man , this is unbelievable ! I mean , it is great , but ...

emotion_cause.span: 17_this is unbelievable ! I mean , it is great

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I know , it is great !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Aww , I do not want to see that !

emotion_cause.span: 19_I do not want to see that !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: We are so stupid ! Do you know what going on in there ? They are trying to take Joey !
